    A

    at.campus02.bsd - package at.campus02.bsd
     

    C

    Cocktail - Class in at.campus02.bsd
    Class that inherits from the at.campus02.bsd.Drink Class and creates a new at.campus02.bsd.Cocktail
    Cocktail(String, List) - Constructor for class at.campus02.bsd.Cocktail

    D

    Drink - Class in at.campus02.bsd
    Abstract base class for concrete drink classes
    Drink(String) - Constructor for class at.campus02.bsd.Drink
    Creates a at.campus02.bsd.Drink object with given name
    DrinkQueue - Class in at.campus02.bsd
    Class that represents a queue that stores at.campus02.bsd.Drink Objects
    DrinkQueue(int) - Constructor for class at.campus02.bsd.DrinkQueue
     

    E

    element() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.DrinkQueue
    returns the first drink without deleting it (same as peek)
    element() - Method in interface at.campus02.bsd.IQueue
    returns the first element without deleting it (same as peek)
    element() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.StringQueue
    returns the first element without deleting it (same as peek)

    G

    getAlcoholPercent() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Drink
    Calculates and returns the alcohol percentage
    getAlcoholPercent() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Liquid
     
    getAlcoholPercent() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.SimpleDrink
    Returns alcohol volume percent of liquid l
    getName() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Drink
     
    getName() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Liquid
     
    getVolume() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Drink
    Calculates and returns volume of drink
    getVolume() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Liquid
     
    getVolume() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.SimpleDrink
    Returns volume of liquid l

    I

    IQueue - Interface in at.campus02.bsd
    Interface that represents a queue that stores String Objects
    isAlcoholic() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Drink
    Gives information if drink is alcoholic or not
    isAlcoholic() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.SimpleDrink
    Gives information if drink is alcoholic or not

    L

    l - Variable in class at.campus02.bsd.SimpleDrink
     
    Liquid - Class in at.campus02.bsd
    Class that creates a new at.campus02.bsd.Liquid with a name, the volume in litres and the alcohol percentage
    Liquid(String, double, double) - Constructor for class at.campus02.bsd.Liquid
    Constructor to create a new liquid

    N

    name - Variable in class at.campus02.bsd.Drink
     

    O

    offer(Drink) - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.DrinkQueue
    adds a new at.campus02.bsd.Drink to the end of the queue
    offer(String) - Method in interface at.campus02.bsd.IQueue
    adds a new Object to the end of the queue
    offer(String) - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.StringQueue
    adds a new Object to the end of the queue

    P

    peek() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.DrinkQueue
    returns the first drink without deleting it
    peek() - Method in interface at.campus02.bsd.IQueue
    returns the first element without deleting it
    peek() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.StringQueue
    returns the first element without deleting it
    poll() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.DrinkQueue
    removes and returns the first drink in the queue
    poll() - Method in interface at.campus02.bsd.IQueue
    removes and returns the first element in the queue
    poll() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.StringQueue
    removes and returns the first element in the queue

    R

    remove() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.DrinkQueue
    removes and returns the first drink in the queue (same als poll)
    remove() - Method in interface at.campus02.bsd.IQueue
    removes and returns the first element in the queue (same als poll)
    remove() - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.StringQueue
    removes and returns the first element in the queue (same als poll)

    setVolume(double) - Method in class at.campus02.bsd.Liquid
     
    SimpleDrink - Class in at.campus02.bsd
    Class represents a simple drink liquid which can be used in drinks
    StringQueue - Class in at.campus02.bsd
    Implementation of the at.campus02.bsd.IQueue Interface that represents a queue that stores String Objects
    StringQueue(int) - Constructor for class at.campus02.bsd.StringQueue
